sentences.arabic: فِي رَأْيِي، النَّوْمُ الْكَافِي مُهِمٌّ جِدًّا لِلصِّحَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Po mom mišljenju, dovoljan san je veoma važan za zdravlje.
sentences.translationEn: In my opinion, sufficient sleep is very important for health.

sentences.arabic: حِينَ لَا أَنَامُ جَيِّدًا أَشْعُرُ بِالتَّعَبِ طُولَ الْيَوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Kada ne spavam dobro, cijeli dan se osjećam umorno.
sentences.translationEn: When I do not sleep well I feel tired all day.

sentences.arabic: يَحْتَاجُ الْجِسْمُ إِلَى ثَمَانِ سَاعَاتٍ مِنَ النَّوْمِ.
sentences.translationEn: The body needs eight hours of sleep.

sentences.arabic: أَنَامُ مُبَكِّرًا كُلَّ يَوْمٍ لِأَكُونَ بِصِحَّةٍ جَيِّدَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Rano legam svaki dan da bih bio u dobrom zdravlju.
sentences.translationEn: I sleep early every day to be in good health.
